title: VeinTreeBreaker
description: A high-performance, all-in-one Vein Miner and Tree Feller with auto-pickup, satisfying animations,auto-replant, and multi-language support.
body:
# VeinTreeBreaker - Ultimate Mining & Logging Plugin

VeinTreeBreaker is a high-performance, feature-rich Minecraft plugin designed to streamline the gathering of resources while maintaining game balance. It combines the power of Vein Miner and Tree Feller with modern automation features.

## 🚀 Key Features

*   **Tree Feller:** Cut down entire trees by breaking just one log. Supports all wood types, including Nether fungi and Mangrove logs.
*   **Vein Miner:** Mine entire ore veins instantly. Supports all ores, Ancient Debris, Obsidian, Amethyst, and more.
*   **Auto-Pickup:** Items are automatically added to your inventory when a vein or tree is broken. If your inventory is full, items will drop at your feet.
*   **Auto-Update (Modrinth Integration):** Keep your plugin up-to-date effortlessly. Use `/vtb update` to check for the latest versions on Modrinth and install them automatically.
*   **Smart Animations:** Blocks break sequentially with satisfying sound effects and particles, preventing lag and providing a polished feel.
*   **Game Balance:**
    *   **Durability:** Tools take damage for every block broken (configurable).
    *   **Hunger:** Breaking blocks consumes exhaustion.
    *   **Safety Threshold:** Stops breaking before your tool snaps.
*   **Lava Safety:** Vein mining automatically stops if it detects nearby lava to prevent accidental resource loss or player death.
*   **Auto-Replant:** Trees are automatically replanted with the correct sapling type.

## 🛠 Commands

*   `/vtb help` - Displays the modern, color-coded help menu.
*   `/vtb toggle` - Enable or disable the plugin features for yourself.
*   `/vtb reload` - Reloads the configuration and language files (Admin only).
*   `/vtb update` - Checks for and installs updates from Modrinth (Admin only).

## 🛡 Permissions

*   `veintreebreaker.use` - Required to use the plugin features (Default: all players).
*   `veintreebreaker.admin` - Required for `/vtb reload` and `/vtb update`.

## ⚙ Compatibility

Works seamlessly on **Spigot**, **Paper**, **Purpur**, and other Spigot-based server implementations. Supports Minecraft versions 1.21.x and above.

---
Developed for ayberkconf
Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/project/veintreebreaker
